title: nepeta congesta
intro: Nepeta congesta is a perennial herbaceous plant species, commonly known as spike catmint or forest catmint, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The health benefits of Nepeta congesta include its ability to improve digestion, reduce anxiety and stress, and act as an expectorant to relieve coughs and congestion. Nepeta congesta can be prepared into various herbal products, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
